global_dla_grid._role: PERSISTENT anchor grid: rgb=color, a=energy. Decayed/reseeded by initGrid, copied by copyGrid, additively deposited into by depositGrid (Blend One One), composited by passthrough. Reads its own prior 'global_' output so it persists frame-to-frame (runtime double-buffers/ping-pongs; reference 04 §10.2/§10.7).

global_xyz._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface (xy=position[0,1], z=0, w=alive). Produced by upstream pointsEmit; updated in place by the agent pass MRT (outputXyz alias). isStateSurface=true (suffix '_xyz') → end-of-frame bindings persist (no swap). Sized stateSize x stateSize by pointsEmit.

global_vel._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface (x=seed, y=justStuck flag, z=0, w=agentRand). Produced by pointsEmit; updated by the agent pass MRT (outputVel alias); vel.y read by depositGrid vertex stage. isStateSurface=true (suffix '_vel').

global_rgba._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface (rgba=agent color). Produced by pointsEmit; passed through by the agent pass MRT (outputRgba alias); rgb read by depositGrid. isStateSurface=true (suffix '_rgba').

feedback._comment: Agent-based multi-pass sim. State lives in PERSISTENT 'global_' surfaces. global_xyz/global_vel/global_rgba (rgba32f) are agent state-surfaces created upstream by pointsEmit (sized stateSize x stateSize) and matched by isStateSurface (suffix '_xyz'/'_vel'/'_rgba') → end-of-frame bindings persist with NO swap (particles continue from last frame). The agent pass writes all three via MRT (drawBuffers:3). global_dla_grid (rgba16f, full-res) is the anchor accumulation surface: initGrid decays+reseeds it, copyGrid refreshes the write buffer post-swap, depositGrid additively scatters stuck agents into it (drawMode:'points', Blend One One, count='input' = stateSize*stateSize derived from xyzTex dims), passthrough composites it over input. No '_iteration' uniform. The deposit pass is drawn as DrawProcedural(Points, count); the vertex stage Loads agent state and emits one 1px point per agent (D3D points = 1px, matching reference gl_PointSize=1).
